title: Java Lazy Constants
description: Initialize a value lazily and at most once with LazyConstant.
learningGoals: Defer expensive initialization with a LazyConstant that is computed at most once.
Note: lazy constants are a preview feature in Java 26, enabled with --enable-preview.

choices: The supplier runs every time get() is called
The field can be reassigned after initialization
The value is initialized before it is returned
completionChecks.explanation: LazyConstant.get() initializes the content if needed, then returns the initialized value.
